description: Dart source file defining an ApiClient class for interacting with a backend API, including methods for health check ('ping') and note upsertion ('upsertNote'), as well as an ApiException class for error handling.

classes.name: ApiClient
classes.description: A client to communicate with a remote backend API, providing health check and note uploading functionalities.

classes.name: ApiException
classes.description: An exception class representing API-related errors, encapsulating status code and message.

methods.name: ping
methods.description: Performs a health check against the backend server, returning true if successful, false otherwise.

methods.name: upsertNote
methods.description: Uploads or updates a note on the backend server, throwing an exception if the operation fails.
